description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named C/C++ CI that runs on every push. Use two jobs, one on ubuntu-latest and one on macos-latest, to check out the repository, install required dependencies, and run make. The ubuntu-latest job should install libusb-1.0-0-dev, libsqlite3-dev, and ninja-build using apt. The macos-latest job should install sqlite, pkg-config, libusb, and ninja using brew.
